summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. 39 hydrated PRs are kept independent. #51822 is downgraded to needs_human because the validator flagged it as security-sensitive, but the hydrated preflight item is explicitly security_sensitive:false and the preflight security boundary reports no security-sensitive job refs, so route_security is not safely repairable from the provided artifacts.
